69/2026, the President decided to award the Order of Courage of the 3rd degree to 352 military personnel, 190 of them posthumously.

tavily.raw: {"query":"Zelenskyy Ukraine Statehood Day 2026 decree award recipients culture science education sports list","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.ukrinform.net/rubric-society/4134053-zelensky-awards-state-scholarships-to-90-outstanding-figures-in-science-culture-and-arts.html","title":"Zelensky awards state scholarships to 90 outstanding figures in science, culture, and arts","content":"# Zelensky awards state scholarships to 90 outstanding figures in science, culture, and arts. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky has awarded state scholarships to 90 outstanding figures in science, culture, and the arts. According to Ukrinform, the relevant decrees No. 495/2026 and No. 496/2026 have been published on the President’s website. Decree No. 495/2026 provides for the lifetime awarding of seven state scholarships to outstanding figures in science who have reached the age of seventy. Decree No. 496/2026 provides for the lifetime award of 15 state scholarships to outstanding figures in culture and the arts who have reached the age of seventy. Among the scholarship recipients is Vasyl Zinkevych, Hero of Ukraine, People’s Artist of the Ukrainian SSR, and laureate of the Taras Shevchenko State Prize of Ukraine.","score":0.826278,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://en.interfax.com.ua/news/general/1138517.html","title":"Zelenskyy signs decrees on state awards: awardees incl Finnish PM, FMs of Lithuania, Austria","content":"The servicemen were also awarded the Presidential Order of Ukraine Cross of Military Merit, the Order of Bohdan Khmelnytsky of the 3rd degree, the Order For Courage of the 1st-2nd degree, the Medal For Military Service to Ukraine and the Medal For a Saved Life. By Decree No. 67/2026, the President approved awards to a number of figures for significant merits in strengthening Ukrainian statehood, courage and dedication shown in protecting the sovereignty and territorial integrity of Ukraine, significant personal contribution to the development of various spheres of public life and conscientious performance of professional duty, in particular the Order of Prince Yaroslav the Wise of the 5th degree, the Order For Merit of the 1st-3rd degree, the Order For Courage of the 2nd-3rd degree, the Order of Princess Olha of the 2nd-3rd degree, the Order For Valiant Mining Labor of the 3rd degree, the Medals For a Saved Life and For Labor and Victory.","score":0.78314424,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://unn.ua/en/news/zelenskyy-honored-outstanding-figures-in-culture-sports-and-science-with-the-state-award-national-legend-of-ukraine","title":"Zelenskyy honored outstanding figures in culture, sports ...","content":"Among those who received the award are: Serge Lifar, Anatoliy Kryvolap, Vasyl Zinkevych, James Temerty, Lyudmyla Monastyrska, Volodymyr Horbulin","score":0.75312227,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.nas.gov.ua/en/news/prezident-ukrani-nagorodiv-naukovcya-akademi-z-nagodi-dnya-ukransko-derzhavnosti","title":"The President of Ukraine awarded an Academy scholar on ...","content":"On July 15, 2026, the President of Ukraine Volodymyr Zelenskyy signed Decree No. 604/2026 \"On awarding state honors of Ukraine on the occasion","score":0.57322514,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.president.gov.ua/en/news/u-den-ukrayinskoyi-derzhavnosti-prezident-vidznachiv-nagorod-105457","title":"On Ukrainian Statehood Day, the President Honored ...","content":"Volodymyr Zelenskyy Presented State Awards and Conferred Honorary Titles on Representatives of Culture, Publishing, Science, Education, and","score":0.55478466,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":1.18,"request_id":"c7bb048f-9f1a-4b69-9f6d-b6f31aa4e18c"}
